testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check FAQ tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check FAQ tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check Manuals&Docs tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check Manuals&Docs tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check Download tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check Download tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check Registration&Warranty tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check Registration&Warranty tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check ContactUs tab
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check ContactUs tab

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check correct OS changing and saving
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check correct OS changing and saving

testcase.name: Check Support page works correctly should open Support page for printer and check redirect to Printers home page
testcase.classname: should open Support page for printer and check redirect to Printers home page

testcase.name: Checking Large format printer functionality should hover Large Format Printers and check that correct page was opened
testcase.classname: should hover Large Format Printers and check that correct page was opened

testcase.name: Checking Large format printer functionality should check that filter is working correct for Large format and clear filter
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Large format and clear filter

testcase.name: Checking Large format printer functionality should open Learn More page for Large Format Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Large Format Printers

testcase.name: Checking Large format printer functionality should open LFP page and use pagination
testcase.classname: should open LFP page and use pagination

testcase.name: Checking Large format printer functionality should open LFP page and use sorting by price and name
testcase.classname: should open LFP page and use sorting by price and name

testcase.name: Checking Large format printer functionality should open Support page from PLP
testcase.classname: should open Support page from PLP

testsuite.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for InkJet printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for InkJet printers

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for Laser Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Laser Printers

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for Dot Matrix Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Dot Matrix Printers

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for Label Maker Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Label Maker Printers

testsuite.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over InkJet Printers and open random page
testcase.classname: should hover over InkJet Printers and open random page

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over Laser Printers and open random page
testcase.classname: should hover over Laser Printers and open random page

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over Dot Matrix Printers and open page
testcase.classname: should hover over Dot Matrix Printers and open page

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over Label maker Printers and open random page
testcase.classname: should hover over Label maker Printers and open random page

testsuite.name: Check Support search page works correctly

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should open Support page and perform search by Product name
testcase.classname: should open Support page and perform search by Product name

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should open Support page and perform search by Serial Number
testcase.classname: should open Support page and perform search by Serial Number

testcase.name: Checking Address Book Tab should check negative testcases while creating new Address
testcase.classname: should check negative testcases while creating new Address

testcase.classname: should edit created before Address and check for changes

testcase.classname: should delete created before Address

testsuite.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Multiple Consumables to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Multiple Consumables to purchase

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware with CoverPlus to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware with CoverPlus to purchase

testcase.name: Checking Update Email Tab should check that new Email is saved successfully
testcase.classname: should check that new Email is saved successfully

testsuite.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that pagination working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that pagination working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that sorting by Price is working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that sorting by Price is working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that sorting by Name is working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that sorting by Name is working correct for PLP

testsuite.name: Send a message when forgot password

testcase.name: Send a message when forgot password should click Forgot Password btn and assert an alert
testcase.classname: should click Forgot Password btn and assert an alert

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filters are working correct for Ink Printer
testcase.classname: should check that filters are working correct for Ink Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that several filters shows correct result for Dot Printer
testcase.classname: should check that several filters shows correct result for Dot Printer

testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer

testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Label Maker Printers

testsuite.name: Checking tabs on My Account menu

testcase.name: Checking tabs on My Account menu should check that tabs on My account menu is opened and correct ones

testcase.name: Checking tabs on My Account menu should open My Accounts tab and check Inner blocks
testcase.classname: should open My Accounts tab and check Inner blocks

testcase.name: Checking Update Details Tab should check that new Details are saved successfully
